prompt: Write a paragraph about your favorite season. Do not use any punctuation whatsoever. No periods, commas, apostrophes, question marks, exclamation points, or any other punctuation marks.
response: My favorite season is autumn because the air feels crisp and the trees turn brilliant shades of red orange and gold I love walking outside and hearing leaves crunch under my feet while the sunlight feels gentle and calm Autumn also brings cozy sweaters warm drinks and a peaceful feeling that makes everything seem more beautiful and comforting
